findings.finding: Exact-commit evidence confirms the clean local HEAD, local tracking ref, and live remote bos/issue-51 branch all equal 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36; the current BOS run remains on bos/issue-51 and attempt 3 with no subsequent artifact change recorded.

Independent complete-patch inspection found the capacity-wait reconciliation releases missing, terminal, and unroutable owned waiters, preserves local fencing when provider release fails, drops stale local state for foreign ownership, and refreshes valid owned waiters without consuming Attempt or retry budget.
Exact-SHA evidence reports 363 tests with 0 failures, 100.00% coverage, strict Credo/spec checks, Dialyzer, formatting, and diff hygiene all passing.

No quality defect was identified in the 8-file, 311-line backend orchestration, adapter/client, regression-test, and documentation patch. Exact merged-artifact installation and service-health verification correctly remain post-merge delivery responsibilities.

summary: Passed quality review for exact commit 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36: revision identity, targeted patch inspection, regression behavior, and the full Elixir quality gate have affirmative exact-commit evidence, with no quality findings requiring changes.
